title: AAIB Seeks Inspector of Air Accidents Specialising in Human Factors

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The Air Accidents Investigation Branch (AAIB) has announced a vacancy for an Inspector of Air Accidents with a focus on human factors. This position is crucial for the investigation of air accidents, where understanding human interaction with systems is essential for enhancing aviation safety.

As part of its commitment to improving air travel safety and providing thorough investigations, the AAIB invites qualified candidates to apply for this pivotal role. With its strong ties to aviation, Scotland plays a significant part in the broader context of air accident investigation, where a deeper understanding of human factors remains vital.
